final_message:
Done. The full test suite passes (`6 passed`), and I've written `SOLUTION.md`.

Two bugs, both in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — a successful read never marked the entry as most-recently-used, so a later `put` at capacity could evict a just-read key. Added `move_to_end` on hit.

2. **`put` evicted unconditionally** — the eviction check ran before checking whether the key already existed, so updating an existing key at capacity wrongly evicted another entry. Now it only evicts when inserting a *new* key into a full cache.

I did not touch anything under `tests/`.
